name: Braze Cloud Mode (Actions)
description: Send events server-side to the Braze REST API.

api_key.label: API Key
api_key.description: Created under Developer Console in the Braze Dashboard.

app_id.label: App ID
app_id.description: The app identifier used to reference specific Apps in requests made to the Braze API. Created under Developer Console in the Braze Dashboard.

updateUserProfile.title: Update User Profile
updateUserProfile.description: Update a user's profile attributes in Braze

country.label: Country
country.description: The country code of the user

date_of_first_session.label: Date of First Session
date_of_first_session.description: The date the user first used the app

date_of_last_session.label: Date of Last Session
date_of_last_session.description: The date the user last used the app

email_subscribe.label: Email Subscribe
email_subscribe.description: The user's email subscription preference: “opted_in” (explicitly registered to receive email messages), “unsubscribed” (explicitly opted out of email messages), and “subscribed” (neither opted in nor out).

email_open_tracking_disabled.label: Email Open Tracking Disabled
email_open_tracking_disabled.description: Set to true to disable the open tracking pixel from being added to all future emails sent to this user.

email_click_tracking_disabled.label: Email Click Tracking Disabled
email_click_tracking_disabled.description: Set to true to disable the click tracking for all links within a future email, sent to this user.

facebook.label: Facebook Attribution Data
facebook.description: Hash of Facebook attribution containing any of `id` (string), `likes` (array of strings), `num_friends` (integer).

gender.label: Gender
gender.description: The user's gender: “M”, “F”, “O” (other), “N” (not applicable), “P” (prefer not to say) or nil (unknown).

image_url.label: Image URL
image_url.description: URL of image to be associated with user profile.

marked_email_as_spam_at.label: Marked Email as Spam At
marked_email_as_spam_at.description: The date the user marked their email as spam.

push_subscribe.label: Push Subscribe
push_subscribe.description: The user's push subscription preference: “opted_in” (explicitly registered to receive push messages), “unsubscribed” (explicitly opted out of push messages), and “subscribed” (neither opted in nor out).

push_tokens.label: Push Tokens
push_tokens.description: Array of objects with app_id and token string. You may optionally provide a device_id for the device this token is associated with, e.g., [{"app_id": App Identifier, "token": "abcd", "device_id": "optional_field_value"}]. If a device_id is not provided, one will be randomly generated.

app_id.label: App ID
app_id.description: The app identifier for the push token.

device_id.label: Device ID
device_id.description: Identifier for the device associated with this token

time_zone.label: Time zone
time_zone.description: The user’s time zone name from IANA Time Zone Database  (e.g., “America/New_York” or “Eastern Time (US & Canada)”). Only valid time zone values will be set.

twitter.label: Twitter Attribution Data
twitter.description: Hash containing any of id (integer), screen_name (string, Twitter handle), followers_count (integer), friends_count (integer), statuses_count (integer).

subscription_groups.label: Subscription Groups
subscription_groups.description: Array of objects used to manage a user's subscription status for specific subscription groups.

subscription_group_id.label: Subscription Group ID
subscription_group_id.description: The identifier for the subscription group

custom_attributes.label: Custom Attributes
custom_attributes.description: Hash of custom attributes to send to Braze

_update_existing_only.label: Update Existing Only
_update_existing_only.description: Setting this flag to true will put the API in "Update Only" mode. When using a "user_alias", "Update Only" mode is always true.

enable_batching.label: Batch Data to Braze
enable_batching.description: If true, Segment will batch events before sending to Braze’s user track endpoint. Braze accepts batches of up to 75 events.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

_update_existing_only.label: Update Existing Only
_update_existing_only.description: Setting this flag to true will put the API in "Update Only" mode. When using a "user_alias", "Update Only" mode is always true.

enable_batching.label: Batch Data to Braze
enable_batching.description: If true, Segment will batch events before sending to Braze’s user track endpoint. Braze accepts batches of up to 75 events.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

trackPurchase.title: Track Purchase
trackPurchase.description: Records purchases in Braze. Consider using the **"Order Placed (beta)"** mapping instead, which uses Braze's newer, preferred method that maps to Braze's [Ecommerce Recommended Order Placed event](https://www.braze.com/docs/user_guide/data/activation/custom_data/recommended_events/ecommerce_events/?tab=ecommerce.order_placed).

_update_existing_only.label: Update Existing Only
_update_existing_only.description: Setting this flag to true will put the API in "Update Only" mode. When using a "user_alias", "Update Only" mode is always true.

enable_batching.label: Batch Data to Braze
enable_batching.description: If true, Segment will batch events before sending to Braze’s user track endpoint. Braze accepts batches of up to 75 events.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

createAlias.title: Create Alias
createAlias.description: Create new user aliases for existing identified users, or to create new unidentified users.

external_id.label: External ID
external_id.description: The external ID of the user to create an alias for.

alias_label.label: Alias Label
alias_label.description: A label indicating the type of alias

identifyUser.title: Identify User
identifyUser.description: Identifies an unidentified (alias-only) user. Use alongside the Create Alias action, or with user aliases you have already defined.

external_id.label: External ID
external_id.description: The external ID of the user to identify.

merge_behavior.label: Merge Behavior
merge_behavior.description: Sets the endpoint to merge some fields found exclusively on the anonymous user to the identified user. See [the docs](https://www.braze.com/docs/api/endpoints/user_data/post_user_identify/#request-parameters).

identifyUser2.title: Identify User V2
identifyUser2.description: Identifies an unidentified (alias-only) user. Use alongside the Create Alias action, or with user aliases you have already defined.

syncMode.label: How to identify Users
syncMode.description: Define how the records from your destination will be synced.

external_id.label: External ID
external_id.description: The external ID of the user to identify.

prioritization.label: Prioritization
prioritization.description: Prioritization settings for user merging if multiple users are found. Required when email_to_identify is provided.

first_priority.label: First Priority
first_priority.description: First priority for user merging if multiple users are found

second_priority.label: Second Priority
second_priority.description: Second priority for user merging if multiple users are found

merge_behavior.label: Merge Behavior
merge_behavior.description: Sets the endpoint to merge some fields found exclusively on the anonymous user to the identified user. See [the docs](https://www.braze.com/docs/api/endpoints/user_data/post_user_identify/#request-parameters).

syncMode.label: How to track events
syncMode.description: Define how the records from your destination will be synced.

enable_batching.label: Batch Data to Braze
enable_batching.description: If true, Segment will batch events before sending to Braze’s user track endpoint. Braze accepts batches of up to 75 events.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

trackPurchase2.title: Track Purchase V2
trackPurchase2.description: Records purchases in Braze. Consider using the **"Order Placed (beta)"** mapping instead, which uses Braze's newer, preferred method that maps to Braze's [Ecommerce Recommended Order Placed event](https://www.braze.com/docs/user_guide/data/activation/custom_data/recommended_events/ecommerce_events/?tab=ecommerce.order_placed).

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

syncMode.description: Define how the records from your destination will be synced.

email_click_tracking_disabled.label: Email Click Tracking Disabled
email_click_tracking_disabled.description: Set to true to disable the click tracking for all links within a future email, sent to this user.

image_url.label: Image URL
image_url.description: URL of image to be associated with user profile.

marked_email_as_spam_at.label: Marked Email as Spam At
marked_email_as_spam_at.description: The date the user marked their email as spam.

push_subscribe.label: Push Subscribe
push_subscribe.description: The user's push subscription preference: “opted_in” (explicitly registered to receive push messages), “unsubscribed” (explicitly opted out of push messages), and “subscribed” (neither opted in nor out).

You may optionally provide a device_id for the device this token is associated with, e.g., [{"app_id": App Identifier, "token": "abcd", "device_id": "optional_field_value"}]. If a device_id is not provided, one will be randomly generated.

app_id.label: App ID

device_id.label: Device ID

time_zone.label: Time zone

subscription_group_id.label: Subscription Group ID
subscription_group_id.description: The identifier for the subscription group

custom_attributes.label: Custom Attributes
custom_attributes.description: Hash of custom attributes to send to Braze

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

createAlias2.title: Create Alias V2
createAlias2.description: Create new user aliases for existing identified users, or to create new unidentified users.

syncMode.label: How to add Aliases
syncMode.description: Define how the records from your destination will be synced.

external_id.label: External ID
external_id.description: The external ID of the user to create an alias for.

alias_label.label: Alias Label
alias_label.description: A label indicating the type of alias

upsertCatalogItem.title: Upsert Catalog Item
upsertCatalogItem.description: Upserts or deletes items in a catalog

syncMode.label: How to sync records
syncMode.description: Define how the records from your destination will be synced.

onMappingSave.label: Select or Create a Catalog
onMappingSave.description: Select an existing catalog or create a new one in Braze.

operation.label: Operation
operation.description: Whether to select an existing catalog or create a new one in Braze.

selected_catalog_name.label: Catalog Name
selected_catalog_name.description: The unique name of the catalog.

created_catalog_name.label: Catalog Name
created_catalog_name.description: The name of the catalog. Must be unique. Maximum 250 characters. Supported characters: letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores.

description.label: Catalog Description
description.description: The description of the catalog. Maximum 250 characters.

columns.label: Catalog Fields
columns.description: A list of fields to create in the catalog. Maximum 500 fields. ID field is added by default.

name.label: Field Name
name.description: The name of the field. Maximum 250 characters. Supported characters: letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores.

type.label: Field Type
type.description: The data type of the field.

item.label: Catalog item to upsert
item.description: The item to upsert in the catalog. The item object should contain fields that exist in the catalog. The item object should not contain the id field.

item_id.label: Item ID
item_id.description: The unique identifier for the item. Maximum 250 characters. Supported characters: letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores.

enable_batching.label: Batch Data to Braze?
enable_batching.description: If true, Segment will batch events before sending to Braze.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: If batching is enabled, this is the number of events to include in each batch. Maximum 50 events per batch.

triggerCampaign.title: Trigger Campaign
triggerCampaign.description: Trigger a Braze Campaign via API-triggered delivery

campaign_id.label: Campaign ID
campaign_id.description: The ID of the Braze campaign to trigger. The campaign must be an API-triggered campaign created in Braze.

send_id.label: Send ID
send_id.description: Optional string to identify the send. This can be used for send level analytics, or to cancel a send.

trigger_properties.label: Trigger Properties
trigger_properties.description: Optional data that will be used to personalize the campaign message. Personalization key-value pairs that will apply to all users in this request.

broadcast.label: Broadcast
broadcast.description: If set to true, and if the audience is not provided, the campaign will be sent to all the users in the segment targeted by the campaign. It can not be used with "recipients".

attachments.label: Attachments
attachments.description: Attachments to send along with the campaign. Limited to 2MB per file.

file_name.label: File Name
file_name.description: The name of the file to be attached.

url.label: URL
url.description: The URL of the file to be attached.

recipients.label: Recipients
recipients.description: An array of user identifiers to send the campaign to. It can not be used with "broadcast".

external_user_id.label: External User ID
external_user_id.description: External identifier of user to receive message.

user_alias.label: User Alias
user_alias.description: User alias object to identify the user.

email.label: Email
email.description: Email address of user to receive message.

trigger_properties.label: User Trigger Properties
trigger_properties.description: Properties that will override the default trigger_properties for a specific user.

send_to_existing_only.label: Send to Existing Only
send_to_existing_only.description: Defaults to true, can't be used with user aliases; if set to false, an attributes object must also be included.

attributes.label: User Attributes
attributes.description: Fields in the attributes object will create or update an attribute of that name with the given value on the specified user profile before the message is sent and existing values will be overwritten.

prioritization.label: Prioritization
prioritization.description: Prioritization settings; required when using email in recipients. This prioritization will be applied to all recipients.

first_priority.label: First Priority
first_priority.description: First priority in the prioritization sequence

second_priority.label: Second Priority
second_priority.description: Second priority in the prioritization sequence

audience.label: Audience
audience.description: A standard audience object to specify the users to send the campaign to. Including "audience" will only send to users in the audience

triggerCanvas.title: Trigger Canvas
triggerCanvas.description: Trigger a Braze Canvas to deliver a cross-channel message to the specified user.

canvas_id.label: Canvas ID
canvas_id.description: The ID of the canvas to trigger. The canvas must be API-triggered and the status must be "Draft" or "Active".

canvas_entry_properties.label: Canvas Entry Properties
canvas_entry_properties.description: Optional data that will be used to personalize the canvas message. Personalization key-value pairs that will apply to all users in this request.

broadcast.label: Broadcast
broadcast.description: If set to true, the canvas will be sent to all the users in the segment targeted by the canvas. It cannot be used with "recipients".

recipients.label: Recipients
recipients.description: An array of user identifiers to send the canvas to. It cannot be used with "broadcast".

external_user_id.label: External User ID
external_user_id.description: External identifier of user to receive message.

user_alias.label: User Alias
user_alias.description: User alias object of the user.

email.label: Email
email.description: Email address of user to receive message.

canvas_entry_properties.label: Canvas Entry Properties
canvas_entry_properties.description: Properties that will override the default canvas_entry_properties for a specific user.

send_to_existing_only.label: Send to Existing Only
send_to_existing_only.description: Defaults to true, cannot be used with user aliases; if set to false, an attributes object must also be included.

attributes.label: Attributes
attributes.description: Fields in the attributes object will create or update an attribute of that name with the given value on the specified user profile before the message is sent and existing values will be overwritten.

prioritization.label: Prioritization
prioritization.description: Prioritization settings; required when using email in recipients. This prioritization will be applied to all recipients.

first_priority.label: First Priority
first_priority.description: First priority in the prioritization sequence

second_priority.label: Second Priority
second_priority.description: Second priority in the prioritization sequence

audience.label: Audience
audience.description: A standard audience object to specify the users to send the canvas to. Including "audience" will only send to users in the audience

ecommerce.title: Ecommerce Event (multi product)
ecommerce.description: (Beta) Send a multi product [Ecommerce Recommended event](https://www.braze.com/docs/user_guide/data/activation/custom_data/recommended_events/ecommerce_events) to Braze.

syncMode.label: How to track events
syncMode.description: Define how the records from your destination will be synced.

name.label: Ecommerce Event Name
name.description: The name of the Braze ecommerce recommended event

cancel_reason.label: Cancel Reason
cancel_reason.description: Reason why the order was cancelled.

time.label: Time
time.description: Timestamp for when the event occurred.

order_id.label: Order ID
order_id.description: Unique identifier for the order placed.

cart_id.label: Cart ID
cart_id.description: Unique identifier for the cart. If no value is passed, Braze will determine a default value (shared across cart, checkout, and order events) for the user cart mapping.

total_value.label: Total Value
total_value.description: Total monetary value of the cart.

total_discounts.label: Total Discounts
total_discounts.description: Total amount of discounts applied to the order.

discounts.label: Discounts
discounts.description: Details of all discounts applied to the order.

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: Currency code for the transaction. Defaults to USD if no value passed.

source.label: Source
source.description: Source the event is derived from.

metadata.label: Metadata
metadata.description: Additional metadata for the ecommerce event.

enable_batching.label: Batch Data to Braze
enable_batching.description: If true, Segment will batch events before sending to Braze’s user track endpoint.

batch_size.label: Maximum Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

products.label: Products
products.description: List of products associated with the ecommerce event. Standard product fields are mapped by default. Any additional fields added into a product item will be sent as product level metadata.

product_id.label: Product ID
product_id.description: A unique identifier for the product that was viewed. This value be can be the product ID or SKU

product_name.label: Product Name
product_name.description: The name of the product that was viewed.

variant_id.label: Variant ID
variant_id.description: A unique identifier for the product variant. An example is shirt_medium_blue

image_url.label: Image URL
image_url.description: The URL of the product image.

product_url.label: Product URL
product_url.description: URL to the product page for more details.

quantity.label: Quantity
quantity.description: Number of units of the product in the cart.

price.label: Price
price.description: The variant unit price of the product at the time of viewing.

ecommerceSingleProduct.title: Ecommerce Event (single product)
ecommerceSingleProduct.description: (Beta) Send a single product [Ecommerce Recommended event](https://www.braze.com/docs/user_guide/data/activation/custom_data/recommended_events/ecommerce_events) to Braze.

syncMode.label: How to track events
syncMode.description: Define how the records from your destination will be synced.

name.label: Ecommerce Event Name
name.description: The name of the Braze ecommerce recommended event

cancel_reason.label: Cancel Reason
cancel_reason.description: Reason why the order was cancelled.

time.label: Time
time.description: Timestamp for when the event occurred.

order_id.label: Order ID
order_id.description: Unique identifier for the order placed.

cart_id.label: Cart ID
cart_id.description: Unique identifier for the cart. If no value is passed, Braze will determine a default value (shared across cart, checkout, and order events) for the user cart mapping.

total_value.label: Total Value
total_value.description: Total monetary value of the cart.

total_discounts.label: Total Discounts
total_discounts.description: Total amount of discounts applied to the order.

discounts.label: Discounts
discounts.description: Details of all discounts applied to the order.

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: Currency code for the transaction. Defaults to USD if no value passed.

source.label: Source
source.description: Source the event is derived from.

metadata.label: Metadata
metadata.description: Additional metadata for the ecommerce event.

enable_batching.label: Batch Data to Braze
enable_batching.description: If true, Segment will batch events before sending to Braze’s user track endpoint.

batch_size.label: Maximum Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

product.label: Product
product.description: Product details associated with the ecommerce event.

product_id.label: Product ID
product_id.description: A unique identifier for the product that was viewed. This value be can be the product ID or SKU

product_name.label: Product Name
product_name.description: The name of the product that was viewed.

variant_id.label: Variant ID
variant_id.description: A unique identifier for the product variant. An example is shirt_medium_blue

image_url.label: Image URL
image_url.description: The URL of the product image.

product_url.label: Product URL
product_url.description: URL to the product page for more details.

price.label: Price
price.description: The variant unit price of the product at the time of viewing.

debouncePlugin.title: Debounce Middleware
debouncePlugin.description: When enabled, it ensures that only events where at least one changed trait value are sent to Braze, and events with duplicate traits are not sent. Debounce functionality requires a frontend client to work. Therefore, it cannot be used with server-side libraries or with Engage.

presets.name: Track Calls
presets.subscribe: type = "track" and event != "Order Completed" and event != "Checkout Started" and event != "Order Refunded" and event != "Order Cancelled" and event != "Product Viewed"
